title: National Cyber Security Centre Research & Innovation Priorities
summary: Ireland's National Cyber Security Centre sets out research and innovation priorities, stating that the global shift to post-quantum cryptography is already underway and that Ireland must ensure a secure transition for Government, regulated sectors and critical infrastructure.

title: Opening Statement by Richard Browne, Director of the National Cyber Security Centre, to the Joint Committee on Foreign Affairs and Defence
summary: Opening statement by the Director of Ireland's National Cyber Security Centre to an Oireachtas joint committee, which references the challenges associated with the shift to post-quantum computing alongside other cyber threats.
